hero.subtitle: 24/7 safe, comfortable, and fast transportation in Adana
hero.trust1Desc: Licensed drivers and regularly maintained cars.
hero.trust2Desc: Average dispatch time is around 8-12 minutes.
hero.trust3Desc: Highly recommended by passengers across Adana.

announcementTeaser.title: Service area and access notes
announcementTeaser.description: We keep the latest service area details, availability notes, and operating updates for Kenan Evren Sultan Taxi on the announcements page.

features.lead: If you are looking for a taxi station that works with a clear service boundary, direct communication, and a calm driving standard, this section explains the difference in a more useful way.
supportPoints: Our focus is fast dispatch within the nearby service zone and realistic communication about availability.
Driver quality, vehicle cleanliness, and safe driving are central parts of our service standard.
Our phone and WhatsApp lines stay active throughout the day, with clear updates on whether a car can be sent.

f1.title: 24/7 Reachable Service
f1.desc: We stay reachable by phone and WhatsApp throughout the day and respond quickly to requests coming from nearby areas.
f1.detail: Even at late hours, the line remains open and availability is shared clearly before dispatch.

f2.title: Safe and Well-Kept Rides
f2.desc: Licensed drivers, regular vehicle maintenance, and a clean cabin standard create a more reassuring travel experience.
f2.detail: Even for short rides, controlled driving and vehicle order are treated as core parts of quality.

f3.title: Fast Dispatch Within Approx. 2 km
f3.desc: Within the approximate 2 km area around Kenan Evren, we can dispatch more quickly and manage waiting time more predictably.
f3.detail: Requests from farther points are still reviewed case by case, with clear feedback whenever support is possible.

f4.title: Drivers Who Know the Area Well
f4.desc: We work with drivers who stay calm in communication, drive carefully, and know the surrounding neighborhoods well.
f4.detail: That local familiarity matters most in nearby streets, connector roads, and busy times of day.

testimonials.title: Customer Reviews
testimonials.r1: Arrived fast and the car was very clean. Thanks.
testimonials.r2: The only station I trust in Adana. Available 24/7.
testimonials.r3: Driver was very kind, and the ride felt safe.

map.title: Our Service Area
map.desc: Kenan Evren Sultan Taxi serves an approximate 2 km radius around the station.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: We gathered the most common questions about Kenan Evren Sultan Taxi in one place with short, direct answers.
faq.q1: Do you operate during late-night hours?
faq.a1: Yes. Sultan Taxi operates 24/7, including late-night hours.
faq.q2: How long does it usually take for a taxi to arrive?
faq.a2: Depending on traffic, average arrival time is around 8-12 minutes in central areas.
faq.a3: We serve approximately within a 2 km area around our station. Requests from farther locations are handled based on availability.
faq.a4: Cash is accepted. For card payment, let us know during your call so we can send a suitable car.

footer.description: Kenan Evren Sultan Taxi provides reliable 24/7 service within an approximate 2 km service zone.

aboutPage.title: An innovative and comfortable approach to transport in Adana
aboutPage.intro: At Kenan Evren Sultan Taxi, we do not just move you from point A to B; we transform the entire travel experience into a safe, transparent, and refined journey.
aboutPage.p1Text: Uninterrupted and high-quality transportation requires professionalism above all. We shape our driver network and vehicle standards with this mindset.
aboutPage.p2Text: In-cabin order, maintenance standards, and respectful communication are the strict criteria our passengers expect from us. We aim to offer a premium experience even on the shortest rides.
aboutPage.p3Text: Regardless of the time, you can reach us instantly via phone and WhatsApp, just as if you had a dedicated concierge.
aboutPage.fact4: The same high level of care regardless of short or long distances

galleryPage.title: A closer look at the car, the area, and the ride experience
galleryPage.intro: We brought together exterior, interior, and surrounding-area images on this page to help you get a clearer feel for Kenan Evren Sultan Taxi.
galleryPage.heroCaption: The main frame that combines the car, its identity, and how clearly it stands out in the area.
galleryPage.sequenceIntro: Selected exterior photos showing the taxi vehicle in the Kenan Evren area, moving from closer angles to wider street views.
galleryPage.interiorIntro: Selected interior photos that show cabin order, cleanliness, and the overall ride atmosphere more clearly.
galleryPage.finalIntro: More distant frames showing how the taxi appears within the area it serves and how visible it is nearby.
